title: AEP v1.1 A8 Claim SRS Decay
description: v1.1 A8 amendment (STRONGLY PLAUSIBLE × CONTEXT-BOUND PATTERN). Two-agent convergence (pathfinder-IDEA-1 AssumptionDecayClock + strategist-IDEA-3 objective_decay_signal). Was F11c in legion synthesis; split out as independent amendment per HV-6 closure. SM2_LITE applied to non-cue claims; truth-tag auto-downgrade on N×TTL passes. Composes_with: v1.0.3 RegexicalCue SRS substrate, sec02 truth-tags (decay drives downgrade), A6 PilotObservationTTL (sister-mechanism for pilot claims).

bound_to_claim_id.description: Claim this decay schedule applies to. MUST NOT be a RegexicalCue (cues have their own SRS per v1.0.3 schema; A8 covers non-cue claims).

algorithm.description: Decay algorithm. SM2_LITE = inherits v1.0.3 RegexicalCue precedent.

ease_factor.description: SM2_LITE ease factor. Floor 1.3 per SM2 convention; absolute minimum 1.0 to support custom-tuned schedules.

downgrade_chain.description: Ordered chain of truth-tag downgrades on N×TTL passes. Default: PROVEN/RELIABLE -> STRONGLY PLAUSIBLE -> EXPERIMENTAL -> SPECULATIVE FRONTIER -> RETIRED. Validator follows this chain on each lapse.

n_ttl_to_downgrade.description: Number of TTL lapses required for one downgrade step in downgrade_chain. Default 3.

current_downgrade_step.description: Current position in downgrade_chain. 0 = first entry (no downgrade applied yet).
